input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests with Category=Integration trait filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests with Category=Integration trait filter

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run xUnit tests filtered by a specific trait (Category=Integration). Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests with Category=Integration trait filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-7521368dfac44b128a8bd8ca3d087fa9 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-pager 2>&1", "description": "Run xUnit tests with Category=Integration trait filter", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All **5 Integration tests passed** ✅

The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses VSTest's `--filter` with the `Category=Integration` trait, which maps to xUnit's `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]` attribute.
